name: Mexican Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef.
2. Add chopped onions and hot chili peppers to the browned beef.
3. Stir in grated cheddar cheese.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together cornmeal, salt, and soda.
5. Combine the sifted mixture with beaten eggs, buttermilk, oil, and cream of corn.
6. Pour half of the breadcrumb mixture into a deep greased skillet or casserole dish.
7. Add the beef, onion, and chili pepper mixture on top.
8. Cover with the remaining breadcrumb mixture.
9. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
